single_spawn_policy.goal: complete all feasible phase repair and validation attempts inside this one spawn
continue_without_confirmation: missing case_lib seed when phase policy permits bootstrap
spec uncertainty resolvable from C code and problem_context
terminal_blocked_only_for: phase skill declares the current task semantically impossible under current inputs
required toolchain completely unavailable after command evidence

state_reports.stale: report stale when source_version or source_goal_version is no longer current
state_reports.compact_error: report compact-error only as a compaction fact; controller/main decides retry or final blocker

single_spawn_policy.controller_acceptance_model: controller validates final candidate and evidence after spawn returns

handoff.rendered_instructions_compact:
Read /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260714130000/rounds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-annotation-r1/agent_input.json.
The goal is to complete the workflow task assigned by the input JSON; /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_avl_left_rotate-20260714130000/rounds/xizi_avl_left_rotate-annotation-r1/agent_report.json is only the final report file recording the result.
Before acting, read the input JSON completely and read every skill or rule file listed in handoff.rules_source.
The input JSON, declared round worktree, declared source versions, and current files are the source of truth.
Do not rely on parent chat history or unstated assumptions as task context or evidence.
Minimize respawns: perform repair, retry, missing-file bootstrap, and alternative attempts inside this same spawn whenever the input versions are still current.
Do not stop for confirmation about optional context, missing bootstrap files, future proof difficulty, or recoverable tool feedback; make a conservative local choice and continue.
Work only in the declared round worktree; write only the declared report/output files and formal files allowed by allowed_write_paths.
No compromise operations: do not weaken specifications, bypass required checks, fake evidence, change generated files by hand, change witness statements to fit a proof, add Admitted/Axiom, use forbidden tools/tactics, or edit paths outside the handoff.
Task completion means the assigned phase work is completed under the strict workflow, with a terminal agent_result, required evidence, changed-files or blocker details, applicable source_version/source_goal_version, and an output note satisfying output_contract.
Controller acceptance is separate; do not mark yourself accepted or claim acceptance unless the controller writes it.
Reuse only previous_attempts, required_lessons, prior_failure_summaries, and output notes declared in the JSON; previous outputs are non-authoritative and lose conflicts to JSON, manifests, source versions, and current files.
Compact-error is not your blocked judgment; report it only as a compaction fact and let controller/main decide retry or final blocker.
If the strict workflow cannot be completed, write a blocked, stale, or compact-error result with concrete evidence instead of improvising around the process.

problem_context.problem_statement: Verify the pointer-level left rotation primitive with a complete functional separation-logic contract. INPUT must stay annotation-free; only the Verification copy may contain QCP annotations.
problem_context.expected_behavior: Promote the original non-null right child as the returned root; make the original root its left child; move the promoted node original left subtree to the original root right edge; preserve every node address, data value, cached height value, and all three subtrees; do not allocate, free, duplicate, lose, or alias memory.
problem_context.input_output_contract: Use an address-labelled recursive abstract AVL-tree representation that records each node data and cached height. Pre-state must be root A (root B C); post-state must be root (root A B) C with the same physical root/right-child addresses and the same abstract subtrees. A postcondition that only says store_non_empty_tree or store_tree_shape is forbidden.
spec_hint: Define the mathematical tree and recursive separation predicate in the case_lib; the relation must make the exact left-rotation transformation explicit and preserve the full owned heap.

Audit cached-height and AVL-balance claims against the actual C code: the primitive does not update height fields, so never claim refreshed heights or restored balance unless derivable; record unchanged height fields exactly.
preferred_hidden_properties: Address-labelled tree nodes prevent a weak representation from forgetting physical node identity.
forbidden_patterns: Existentially forgetting data, cached height, node identity, or any of the three subtrees.
Claiming general AVL height correctness or balance restoration although the C body never writes height.
reference_case_hints: Use only QCP_examples/QCP_demos_LLM predicate-first recursive tree examples; never inspect QCP_demos_human.

annotation_contract.ready_condition: agent_result.annotation.status == completed and ready_for_annotation_check_round == true only after canonical QCP, case_lib coqc, and annotation-checking pass; self_reworkable_failures must be empty
annotation_contract.blocked_condition: only phase skill hard blockers should use status == blocked; self_repair_budget_exhausted is work evidence, not an automatic blocked condition

mathematical_postconditions_required: Function specs must state what result the function computes, not only bounds or shape facts.
Loop invariants must connect processed state to the final mathematical postcondition.
avoid_spec_antipatterns: Do not weaken the spec to shape-only or bounds-only conditions.
Do not restate the C loops as the mathematical definition.
